description: Synthetic context-embedding sets for context-entropy guard tests (DRIFT-25). Each example has a response embedding and a set of context embeddings, plus an expected classification. Vectors chosen so cosine-similarity weights produce the stated entropy class.

examples.label: healthy
examples.description: Response is equidistant from 4 diverse context segments — uniform weights, H_norm=1.0.

examples.label: collapsed
examples.description: Response is identical to segment 0 and opposite to segments 1-3 — extreme collapse. cosine(resp,seg0)=1 -> weight=1.0; cosine(resp,seg1..3)=-1 -> weight=0. H_norm~=0.

examples.label: healthy
examples.description: 3 segments with similar cosine similarity to response — high entropy.

examples.label: collapsed
examples.description: Response strongly aligned with segment 0 and strongly anti-aligned with segments 1-2. Near-total collapse.
